title: Last Summer
tmdbOverview: One summer, a French teenager who has been living with his mother in the city moves in with his estranged father’s family in the countryside, where he clashes with his stepmother.
synopsis: Released in 2023, Last Summer is a drama film from France. It carries a 6.3 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a MA 15+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
